items.titolo: Nvidia's memory costs soar 485%, latest AI systems now cost $7.8 million to build — memory now comprises 25% of the total cost, Rubin GPUs a mere $50,000 apiece
items.descrizione: As memory content per rack increases in Vera Rubin platform, it now accounts for nearly 25% of its cost.

items.titolo: Google showed me the future of Android Auto - and now I dread my own car
items.descrizione: The latest showcase of Android Auto highlighted key improvements to the user interface, map design, Gemini features, and more.

items.titolo: Anthropic paga SpaceX per i data center Colossus di Musk
items.descrizione: Anthropic paga 1,25 miliardi di dollari al mese a SpaceX per i data center Colossus. L'accordo vale 15 miliardi di dollari all'anno fino al 2029. The post Anthropic paga SpaceX per i data center Colossus di Musk appeared
